textByHash.54691f33aa6f6bf3397b5765e626fec8a1744265: We've had various reports come in about a sudden increase in dragon activity. I assume this is what you're referring to?
textByHash.798630178483bd7f0c84fc043d42e5fd26ba1070: On behalf of everyone in Ardougne, I thank you for your help adventurer. I'm afraid I don't have time to talk, my predecessor has left me with a lot of work to do.
textByHash.9b6fdc9b2eafd32610b9dae465fb2f89e561ecf2: With our forces united, we should have the strength to take on these dragons and destroy them.
